details.test: Task 1: Book 60-min introductory coaching session under $250
Task 2: Apply for cheapest 3-month solopreneur program with email support
Task 3: Request quote for virtual keynote with live Q&A
Task 4: Subscribe to newsletter as entrepreneur with weekly topics
Task 5: Create reading list with three recent themed articles
Task 6: Register for next free personal branding webinar within 60 days
Task 7: Build custom package with coaching and speaking services and save estimate
Task 8: Access free personal brand starter toolkit for entrepreneurs
Task 9: Explore tech testimonials, case study, and related service
Task 10: Use FAQ then contact form to ask about first-session refund policy
